mapper.select: select o.id, o.user_id, o.merchant_id, m.name as merchant_name, o.item_type, o.item_name, o.total_amount, o.status, o.pay_channel, o.paid_at, o.created_at from campus_order o left join campus_merchant m on m.id = o.merchant_id where o.id = #{id}

select o.id, o.user_id, o.merchant_id, m.name as merchant_name, o.item_type, o.item_name, o.total_amount, o.status, o.pay_channel, o.paid_at, o.created_at from campus_order o left join campus_merchant m on m.id = o.merchant_id where o.id = #{id} for update

select o.id, o.user_id, o.merchant_id, m.name as merchant_name, o.item_type, o.item_name, o.total_amount, o.status, o.pay_channel, o.paid_at, o.created_at from campus_order o left join campus_merchant m on m.id = o.merchant_id where o.user_id = #{userId} order by o.created_at desc, o.id desc
mapper.update: update campus_order set status = 'CANCELLED' where status = 'UNPAID' and created_at <= #{deadline}
